title: notebook-dry-run output data
description:
The whole sampled-run projection: per-section outcomes + disclosures + render.

``markdown`` is the code-rendered artifact for VERBATIM relay (the LLM never
interprets the run). ``executed_scope`` is always ``"sampled"`` — a reminder,
carried into the journaled receipts, that this run cleared nothing.

executed_scope.description: Always 'sampled' — a preview run; it never clears or signs a section.
executed_scope.title: Executed Scope

env_disclosure.description: Explicit statement that the run executed in the CURRENT LOCAL env (naming the interpreter), NOT the cluster.
env_disclosure.title: Env Disclosure

interpreter.description: The local interpreter path the run executed under.
interpreter.title: Interpreter

sample_env_var.description: The env var the sample cap was exposed to the source through.
sample_env_var.title: Sample Env Var

sample_disclosure.description: How the sample cap was applied: the env var + advisory note that the source must honor it (no silent input truncation), and — when detectable — whether the source appeared to consume the cap.
sample_disclosure.title: Sample Disclosure

sample_cap_consumed.description: Whether the source was observed to READ HPC_NOTEBOOK_SAMPLE_N (true), observed NOT to (false), or undetectable (null — the advisory case).
sample_cap_consumed.title: Sample Cap Consumed

timed_out.description: True when the run hit `timeout_sec` and the in-progress section was abandoned.
timed_out.title: Timed Out

receipts_recorded.description: Slugs a SAMPLED (non-clearing) render receipt was journaled for (empty in standalone mode — no audit_id, no journal scope).
receipts_recorded.title: Receipts Recorded

observables.description: Declared observables measured in the final namespace (audit config only).
observables.title: Observables

markdown.description: The code-rendered projection for VERBATIM relay. Deterministic (no timing).
markdown.title: Markdown

NotebookDryRunAssertion.description:
One statically-declared ``assert`` with its EXECUTED verdict.

Distinct from the static assertion table: ``outcome`` reflects whether the
assert LINE actually ran in this sampled execution — ``passed`` (reached, did
not raise), ``failed`` (reached and raised AssertionError), or ``not_run``
(never reached — the section raised earlier, or the branch was not taken).
NotebookDryRunAssertion.title: notebook-dry-run assertion outcome

NotebookDryRunObservable.description: One declared observable measured in the final namespace (audit config only).
NotebookDryRunObservable.title: notebook-dry-run observable

NotebookDryRunSection.description: The deterministic per-section outcome of the sampled run.
NotebookDryRunSection.title: notebook-dry-run section outcome
